title: FSR+ Shader
description: Minecraft Shader Which is designed to use FSR Upscaling
body:
# FSR+
A Minecraft shaderpack that uses AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution (FSR) to upscale the game from a lower internal resolution to your display resolution. This allows Minecraft to render fewer pixels while maintaining a clear image, potentially improving performance on supported hardware.

Unlike traditional shaders that focus on visual effects, this shaderpack focuses on performance-oriented rendering using modern upscaling techniques.

## Features
- FSR Upscaling: Uses AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution to upscale a lower-resolution render to your screen resolution.
- Hardware Compatible: Works on AMD, NVIDIA, and Intel GPUs because FSR runs entirely in shaders and does not require special hardware.
- Adjustable Render Resolution: Configure the internal render resolution and output resolution to balance image quality and performance.
- RCAS Sharpening: Includes FidelityFX Robust Contrast Adaptive Sharpening to improve clarity after upscaling.
- Vanilla Visual Style: Does not change Minecraft’s lighting or art style, the goal is performance, not visual effects.

## Why use this shaderpack?
Many shaderpacks add heavy graphical effects that reduce FPS.
This shaderpack instead attempts to increase performance by rendering the game at a lower resolution and upscaling it back to your display resolution using FSR.

## Current Status

### ⚠️ Alpha Version

This shaderpack is currently in early development.

**At the moment it may:**
- Reduce performance instead of improving it
- Have visual artifacts
- Lack optimization
  
**Future versions will focus on:**
- Performance improvements
- Better FSR implementation
- Additional configuration options

## Compatibility
- Designed for Iris shader loader

### GPU Compatibility
Because FSR runs entirely in shaders, it works on a wide range of GPUs.  
However, older hardware may not perform well or may experience issues.

Tested and expected to work on:
- **AMD GPUs:** Radeon RX 400 series and newer, including most AMD integrated graphics
- **NVIDIA GPUs:** GeForce GTX 10 series and newer
- **Intel GPUs:** Intel Arc GPUs and most Intel integrated graphics from 7th generation onward

# Disclaimer
Performance and compatibility may vary depending on your GPU and driver version.
